'''âj-dh-g-ng''' ('''kajadhgengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:oratorize|oratorize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-dh-g-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oratorize|oratorize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-dh-g-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kajadhgengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijadhgengoko|thijadhgengoko]] || [[word:jijadhgengoko|jijadhgengoko]] || [[word:shijadhgengoko|shijadhgengoko]] || [[word:kijadhgengoko|kijadhgengoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujadhgengoko|thuthujadhgengoko]] || [[word:jujujadhgengoko|jujujadhgengoko]] || [[word:shushujadhgengoko|shushujadhgengoko]] || [[word:kukujadhgengoko|kukujadhgengoko]]
|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
